description: MCP server for Salesforce CRM — Accounts, Contacts, Opportunities, Leads, Cases.
name: io.github.wyre-technology/salesforce-mcp

environmentVariables.description: Credential source: 'env' reads vars locally, 'gateway' expects header injection from the WYRE MCP Gateway. Set to 'env' for stdio/local use.
environmentVariables.name: AUTH_MODE

environmentVariables.description: Salesforce auth flow: 'client_credentials' (default, requires a Connected App with Client Credentials Flow enabled) or 'username_password' (fallback).
environmentVariables.name: SALESFORCE_AUTH_FLOW

environmentVariables.description: Connected App consumer key. Required when SALESFORCE_AUTH_FLOW=client_credentials.
environmentVariables.name: SALESFORCE_CLIENT_ID

environmentVariables.description: Connected App consumer secret. Required when SALESFORCE_AUTH_FLOW=client_credentials.
environmentVariables.name: SALESFORCE_CLIENT_SECRET

environmentVariables.description: Salesforce org's My Domain URL (e.g. https://yourorg.my.salesforce.com). Required when SALESFORCE_AUTH_FLOW=client_credentials.
environmentVariables.name: SALESFORCE_INSTANCE_URL

environmentVariables.description: Salesforce username. Only used when SALESFORCE_AUTH_FLOW=username_password.
environmentVariables.name: SALESFORCE_USERNAME

environmentVariables.description: Salesforce password. Only used when SALESFORCE_AUTH_FLOW=username_password.
environmentVariables.name: SALESFORCE_PASSWORD

environmentVariables.description: Salesforce security token. Only used when SALESFORCE_AUTH_FLOW=username_password; optional if the org has IP allowlisting configured instead.
environmentVariables.name: SALESFORCE_TOKEN

environmentVariables.description: Transport mode for the server. Set to 'stdio' for local CLI use; the image defaults to 'http' for gateway hosting.
environmentVariables.name: MCP_TRANSPORT

environmentVariables.description: Log verbosity: debug, info, warn, error
environmentVariables.name: LOG_LEVEL

title: Salesforce
